title: scabiosa columbaria subsp. suaveolens
intro: Scabiosa columbaria subsp. suaveolens, also known as the sweet scabious, is a flowering plant species within the genus Scabiosa. It is a type of perennial herb that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of sweet scabious include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health benefits, including colds, sore throats, and digestive issues.
